items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit), which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this integration, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps focus on other functionalities and do not address the print-to-mail service, indicating a lack of coverage for this requirement.
